name: FhirR4BaseObservationComboCode
title: FHIR R4 — `combo-code` parameter matches component codes
description: The FHIR R4 base spec defines Observation-combo-code (token) which matches both Observation.code AND Observation.component.code. Servers SHOULD implement it because it's the only way to find Observations by sub-component code (e.g. systolic BP inside a BP panel). Universally honored across the matrix at the spec level — failure here usually means the server doesn't index component codes at all.

relatedArtifact.label: FHIR R4 — Observation combo-code search parameter
